user.title: Meltem Modbus
user.description: An M-WRG-GW gateway is required. It must already be set up with all supported Meltem M-WRG units in the Meltem app and connected to the Home Assistant host via USB. The integration then scans the configured units and asks for the exact profile of each detected unit.

confirm_usb.title: Discovered Meltem Modbus gateway
confirm_usb.description: Home Assistant found a USB device on {port} ({manufacturer}, {description}). An M-WRG-GW gateway is required. It must already be set up with all supported Meltem M-WRG units in the Meltem app and connected to the Home Assistant host via USB.

profiles.title: Detected Meltem M-WRG units
profiles.description: The integration found {device_count} Meltem M-WRG units. Choose the matching profile for each detected unit.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the Meltem gateway.
error.no_devices_found: No supported Meltem M-WRG units were found on the gateway. Make sure the units are already added and configured in the M-WRG-GW gateway before setting them up in Home Assistant.

init.title: Configure Meltem Modbus
init.description: Choose whether to change the serial connection settings, update profiles for existing units, or scan for new units.

edit_connection.title: Change serial connection
edit_connection.description: Update the serial device path and scheduler request rate used for the Meltem gateway.

edit_profiles.title: Change Meltem device profiles
edit_profiles.description: Update the selected profile for each configured Meltem M-WRG unit.

rescan_units.title: Scan for new Meltem M-WRG units
rescan_units.description: Scan the Meltem gateway for configured Meltem M-WRG units and update the stored profiles.

profiles.title: Detected Meltem M-WRG units
profiles.description: The rescan found {device_count} Meltem M-WRG units. Choose the matching profile for each detected unit.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the Meltem gateway.
error.no_devices_found: No supported Meltem M-WRG units were found on the gateway. Make sure the units are already added and configured in the M-WRG-GW gateway before setting them up in Home Assistant.
